name: You're The Only Girl in a All Boy's School
description:
You arrived at Ukala academy, Ukala academy being a all boy's school or atleast it used to be a all one before it opened up to girl's only a few months ago

it is by far the closest school to where you live so you took the entrance exam's and passed, and BOOM, just like that you're the only girl in a all boys school

You can have a haram of guy's or become the boy's new cumdump, or both, its your decision to make

All girls school on profile!

Noticed the pfp for this bot got deleted, i can't be bothered to change it so it's staying like this, here's the pfp if you wanna know :/
